name: mine-customer-app
description: MINE — customer-facing native app. A person downloads it, enters the join code a business gave them, and the WebView opens that business's branded MINE app (/app). Native bridges: push notifications, QR scanning, share sheet, deep linking.

scripts.init: npm install && npx cap add ios && npx cap add android
scripts.build: echo 'Web is loaded from the deployed backend (/m); no build step needed' && npx cap sync
